mapper.select: SELECT w.order_id, w.cl_order_id, w.created_at AS createdAt, w.updated_at AS updatedAt, c.cl_delivery_date AS dueDate, w.line_id, l.line_name, w.product_id, p.product_name, w.order_qty, w.priority, w.is_followup AS isFollowup, w.status, c.client_id, cl.client_name AS clientName, c.cl_order_date AS clOrderDate FROM work_order w LEFT JOIN production_line l ON w.line_id = l.line_id LEFT JOIN product p ON w.product_id = p.product_id LEFT JOIN client_order c ON w.cl_order_id = c.cl_order_id LEFT JOIN client cl ON c.client_id = cl.client_id WHERE w.order_id = #{orderId}

SELECT cod.cl_order_id, cod.product_id, p.product_name, p.unit, co.client_id, c.client_name, co.cl_order_date, co.cl_delivery_date AS due_date, cod.order_qty, IFNULL(ps.stock_qty, 0) AS stock_qty, GREATEST(cod.order_qty - IFNULL(ps.stock_qty, 0), 0) AS required_qty FROM client_order_detail cod JOIN product p ON cod.product_id = p.product_id JOIN client_order co ON cod.cl_order_id = co.cl_order_id JOIN client c ON co.client_id = c.client_id LEFT JOIN product_stock ps ON cod.product_id = ps.product_id WHERE cod.cl_order_id = #{clOrderId}

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT co.cl_order_id) FROM client_order co JOIN client_order_detail cod ON co.cl_order_id = cod.cl_order_id
WHERE co.status = 'CONFIRMED' AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM work_order wo WHERE wo.cl_order_id = co.cl_order_id )
AND co.cl_order_id LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
